questions.question:
Correct expression tor UDP user datagram length is



Computer Networks: NIELIT 2017 DEC Scientific Assistant A
options: length of UDP = length of IP- length of IP header's
length of UDP= length of UDP-length of UDP header's
length of UDP = length of IP+length of IP header's
length of UDP = length of UDP+length of UDP header's
questions.correct_answer: length of UDP = length of IP- length of IP header's

questions.question:
Host \( \text{A} \) sends a \( \text{UDP} \) datagram containing \( 8880 \; \text{bytes} \) of user data to host \( \text{ B} \) over an Ethernet \( \text{LAN}. \) Ethernet frames may carry data up to \( 1500 \; \text{bytes (i.e. MTU = 1500 bytes)}. \) Size of \( \text{UDP} \) header is \( 8 \; \text{bytes} \) and size of \( \text{IP} \) header is \( 20 \; \text{bytes}. \) There is no option field in \( \text{IP} \) header. How many total number of \( \text{IP} \) fragments will be transmitted and what will be the contents of offset field in the last fragment?



Computer Networks: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section B | Question: 63
